{"command": "python -u -c "
import pandas as pd
df=pd.read_csv('datasets/order_status_2005_may.csv',encoding='latin-1')
df['ORDERDATE']=pd.to_datetime(df['ORDERDATE'])
may=df[(df['YEAR_ID']==2005)&(df['MONTH_ID']==5)].copy()
pw=may[may['ORDERDATE']<='2005-05-13']
cw=may[may['ORDERDATE']>='2005-05-17']

# 1. Sales WoW
pw_sales=round(pw['SALES'].sum())
cw_sales=round(cw['SALES'].sum())
wow_chg=round((cw_sales-pw_sales)/pw_sales*100,1)
print('=== 1. Sales WoW ===')
print('PW Sales:', pw_sales)
print('CW Sales:', cw_sales)
print('WoW Change: {}%'.format(wow_chg))

# 2. Order lines & Order count
pw_lines=len(pw)
cw_lines=len(cw)
pw_orders=pw['ORDERNUMBER'].nunique()
cw_orders=cw['ORDERNUMBER'].nunique()
print()
print('=== 2. Order Lines & Orders ===')
print('PW: {} lines, {} orders'.format(pw_lines, pw_orders))
print('CW: {} lines, {} orders'.format(cw_lines, cw_orders))

# 3. Disputed / Shipped amounts
print()
print('=== 3. Status Breakdown (Amount) ===')
for label, wk in [('PW', pw), ('CW', cw)]:
    print(label+':')
    for s in wk['STATUS'].unique():
        amt=round(wk[wk['STATUS']==s]['SALES'].sum())
        cnt=len(wk[wk['STATUS']==s])
        print('  {}: {} rows, Sales={}'.format(s, cnt, amt))

# 4. Product line exposure
print()
print('=== 4. Product Line ===')
for label, wk in [('PW', pw), ('CW', cw)]:
    print(label+':')
    pl=wk.groupby('PRODUCTLINE')['SALES'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)
    for p, v in pl.items():
        print('  {}: {}'.format(p, round(v)))

# 5. Country exposure
print()
print('=== 5. Country ===')
for label, wk in [('PW', pw), ('CW', cw)]:
    print(label+':')
    ct=wk.groupby('COUNTRY')['SALES'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)
    for c, v in ct.items():
        print('  {}: {}'.format(c, round(v)))

# 6. Customer exposure
print()
print('=== 6. Customer ===')
for label, wk in [('PW', pw), ('CW', cw)]:
    print(label+':')
    cs=wk.groupby('CUSTOMERNAME')['SALES'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)
    for c, v in cs.head(10).items():
        print('  {}: {}'.format(c, round(v)))
"
", "timeout": 30}
